judgeScores.justification: The organizational structure demonstrates excellent domain awareness, categorizing photos and documents by context (personal/work/design) rather than just file extension. The MANIFEST.md is exceptionally thorough with detailed file-purpose tables, visual tree diagrams, and complete accounting of all 80 files with zero remaining in root. Naming conventions remain perfectly consistent (snake_case throughout), and the 2-3 level nesting strikes an ideal balance. The only minor improvement would be relocating runtime logs from config/logs/ to a dedicated data/ or logs/ top-level folder, as logs are operational outputs rather than configuration files.
